_description: Fitted stochastic performance model parameters from Phase 1 benchmarks (HAMR/GAMR).
_fitted_on: TinyLlama-1.1B layers, RTX 3050 6GB Laptop, NVMe SSD
_units: latency in ms/MB, bandwidth in GB/s

ssd_latency._note: Fitted to SSD sequential read latency (ms/MB). lognormal(mu, sigma).

pcie_h2d._note: CPU→GPU PCIe H2D bandwidth for RTX 3050 Laptop GPU. Measured as ~6.8 GB/s sustained.

compute._note: Mean GPU compute time per decoder layer (ms) — from Run_009 latency.csv.

stall_threshold._note: Target stall probability < 5%. Used by Phase 6 risk_model.py.
